executives.name: Leigh Curyer
executives.background: Mr. Curyer has over 20 years of experience in the resources sector. He was previously the Chief Financial Officer and head of corporate development of First Uranium Corporation and has held senior positions at Accord Nuclear Resource Management and Deloitte & Touche.

executives.name: Benjamin Salter
executives.background: Mr. Salter is a Chartered Professional Accountant with over 15 years of experience in financial reporting and corporate finance. He previously served as the Vice President, Finance of the Company.

executives.name: Travis McPherson
executives.background: Mr. McPherson has been with NexGen since 2014. He has over 10 years of experience in the uranium industry and was previously with a boutique investment bank.

executives.name: Gillian Morris
executives.background: Ms. Morris has over 20 years of experience in human resources and corporate operations. She previously held senior HR roles at various mining and resource companies.

board_of_directors.name: Christopher McFadden
board_of_directors.background: Mr. McFadden is a lawyer with over 20 years of experience in the resources sector. He was previously the Chairman of NexGen and has held senior roles at Rio Tinto.

board_of_directors.name: Leigh Curyer
board_of_directors.background: Founder of NexGen Energy Ltd. with extensive experience in uranium project development and corporate finance.

board_of_directors.name: Richard Paton
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Paton has over 30 years of experience in public policy and government relations. He was the President and CEO of the Chemistry Industry Association of Canada.

board_of_directors.name: Trevor Thiele
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Thiele has over 30 years of experience in senior financial roles. He was the CFO of several major Australian resource companies.

board_of_directors.name: Warren Gilman
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Gilman is the Chairman and CEO of Queen's Road Capital Investment Ltd. and has over 30 years of experience as a mining engineer and investment banker.

board_of_directors.name: Brad Wall
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Wall served as the 14th Premier of Saskatchewan from 2007 to 2018. He has extensive experience in economic development and the energy sector.
